name: @radzor/ai-classifier
description: Classify text into categories using LLM-powered classification or rule-based approaches. Supports single and batch classification, custom category definitions with descriptions, and a trainable keyword-based fallback for offline use.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for the LLM used for classification (OpenAI-compatible).

inputs.name: model
inputs.description: Model to use for LLM-based classification.

inputs.name: baseUrl
inputs.description: Base URL for the classification API.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Classification mode: llm (API-based), rules (keyword-based), or hybrid (rules first, LLM fallback).

outputs.name: classificationResult
outputs.description: The classification result with category, confidence, and per-category scores.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence score for the top category (0-1).

actions.name: classify
actions.description: Classify a single text into one of the defined categories.

actions.name: batchClassify
actions.description: Classify multiple texts. Processes sequentially for LLM mode, in parallel for rules mode.

actions.name: defineCategory

params.name: description
params.description: Description of what belongs in this category (used by LLM classifier).

actions.description: Define a classification category with its description and optional keywords.

actions.name: train

params.name: examples
params.description: Labeled examples to extract keywords from for rule-based classification.

actions.description: Train the rule-based classifier by extracting keywords from labeled examples.

connectsTo.description: Route classified content to appropriate handler

llm.constraints: LLM mode requires an OpenAI-compatible API key. Rules mode works offline with no API key. Hybrid mode tries rules first and falls back to LLM when rule confidence is low.
